behavior: 取得所有 Scrum Teams 列表
domainModelNotes: 此為查詢操作，不會修改任何 domain 狀態
應回傳所有存在的 Scrum Teams

dependencies.name: getScrumTeamsProjection
dependencies.note: 使用它查詢資料庫並回傳所有 Scrum Teams

projections.name: GetScrumTeamsProjection extends Projection<Void, List<ScrumTeamDto>>
projections.description: 查詢資料庫取得所有 Scrum Teams 並回傳 List<ScrumTeamDto>

dataTransferObjects.name: ScrumTeamDto
dataTransferObjects.description: Scrum Team 資料傳輸物件

testScenarios.name: should_return_all_teams_when_teams_exist
testScenarios.given: 多個 Scrum Teams 已建立

testScenarios.name: should_return_empty_list_when_no_teams_exist
testScenarios.given: 沒有任何 Scrum Team 存在
then: 應該成功回傳空的 List<ScrumTeamDto>
